messages.content: Kata akibat mempunyai antonim…

Antonim adalah kata yang memiliki makna yang berlawanan atau bertentangan dengan kata lain. Jika kita berbicara tentang kata "akibat", antonimnya bisa menjadi "sebab" atau "penyebab". Ini karena "akibat" merujuk kepada suatu hasil atau konsekuensi dari sebuah peristiwa, sedangkan "sebab" atau "penyebab" merujuk kepada sesuatu yang menyebabkan peristiwa tersebut terjadi. Jadi, dalam hubungan sebab-akibat, "sebab" adalah pendorongnya dan "akibat" adalah hasilnya.

Contoh:
- Sebab hujan, pertandingan ditunda. (Penyebabnya adalah hujan)
- Akibat hujan, pertandingan ditunda. (Konsekuensinya adalah penundaan pertandingan)

Kata akibat mempunyai antonim…
pertanyaan 1Menjawab

A.
Faktor

B.
Sesuatu

C.
Hasil

D.
Menyebabkan

e.
Keuntungan

Dalam pilihan yang diberikan, antonim dari kata "akibat" yang paling tepat adalah:

D. Menyebabkan

Ini karena "akibat" merujuk pada hasil atau konsekuensi dari suatu peristiwa, sedangkan "menyebabkan" berkaitan dengan tindakan atau kejadian yang menyebabkan sesuatu terjadi. Jadi, "menyebabkan" berhubungan dengan proses yang mengarah pada "akibat".

Muhammad Maulidan

To whom it may concern,
I’m applying for the Project Manager position advertised through Jakarta Post. As shown in the enclosed resume, I have a strong academic background in Chemical Engineer graduated from Universitas Indonesia on 2020.
My current work as Project Management in various multinational company has given me firsthand experience in the challenge associated with the development of a successful Petrochemical Company. In addition, I have excellent managerial and communication skills both in Bahasa Indonesia as well as English.
This background, combined with over ten years of Ethylene Plant Operation as Project Management, has given me a unique perspective that would be particularly valuable in meeting the responsibilities of this position, as described in your position. I am and independent individual who capable to work under pressure.
I would welcome the opportunity to meet with you to discuss my qualifications in more detail and look forward to hearing from you soon. Thank you for your time and consideration.
Sincerely,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
What are the skills that applicant presented on the application letter?
Question 2Answer

a.
Bahasa Indonesia and English

b.
Capable work under pressure

c.
Accounting and managerial skills

d.
Public speaking and communication skills

e.
Managerial and communication skills

Based on the application letter provided, the skills that the applicant presented are:

e. Managerial and communication skills

In the letter, Muhammad Maulidan mentions having "excellent managerial and communication skills both in Bahasa Indonesia as well as English." These skills are directly stated in the context of his qualifications for the Project Manager position.

Dedy: Good Morning, James. My name is Dedy

Anton: Good Morning. … to meet you Dedy.

Dedy: So, please take a sit and tell me about yourself

Anton: Good Morning. Nice to meet you, Dedy. 

(Anton would likely respond by greeting Dedy in return and expressing that it is nice to meet him.)

Good Morning all my friends How are you this morning Thanks you for giving me a chance to give the time to present our report. Today we would like to discuss the situation about one of the happening news. It is about the global warning. Friends, when we see our environment, many examples which show about the effect the global warning. It is the impredictable weather, the decreased ozone skin. Global warming is the condition in which the average temperature of the earth surface’s increases. This can be caused by a lot of factors, such as greenhouse effect, air pollution, forest damage and others. We will give you a chance to ask about our presentation. We need your participation to give suggestion for our presentation. Finally, this is our presentation of this report. Thank you for your attention. This can caused by a lot of factors (p.2) The bolded words has similar meaning with…

Question 5Answer

a.
Effect

b.
Dangerous

c.
Something

d.
Component

e.
Cause

e. Cause

The bolded words "This can caused by a lot of factors" indicate that there are various reasons or causes that lead to the condition being discussed—in this case, global warming. "Cause" is the word that has a similar meaning to "factors" in this context.
Write five modals used in offering help expression!

Certainly! Here are five modals commonly used in offering help:

1. Can - "Can I help you with that?"
2. Could - "Could I offer some assistance with your task?"
3. Would - "Would you like some help with this?"
4. May - "May I help you carry those bags?"
5. Should - "Should you need any help, please let me know."

Each of these modals is used to politely offer assistance and can be used in various contexts depending on the level of formality and the situation at hand.

Ant-eaters are perhaps the most curious looking animals.
Their long head and snout look like tubes, and they have no teeth at all. Their front legs are very strong and armed with heavy curved claws with which they break open the nets of ants and termites and then, when the insects rush out, use their long, sticky tongues to lick them up at great speed.
True ant-eaters are found in the swamps and forests of central and South America. Scaly ant-eaters, or pangolins, are found in Africa and tropical Asia.
Various other insect-eating animals are sometimes called ant-eaters, although they really belong to other groups of animals. One of them is the ant-bear, which lives on the plains of South and Central Africa. This has long, erect ears but short blunt claws, an almost hairless tail, yellow brown in color. Unlike the true ant-eaters, it has small teeth.
From the passage above, we can conclude that….
Question 7Answer

a.
ants are classified as predators

b.
ants usually eat death animals

c.
all ants are friends of other insects

d.
ants live in the disgusted places

e.
ants belong to the insect group

e. ants belong to the insect group

The passage discusses different types of animals that feed on ants and various aspects of their physical appearance and habits, not the habits or classification of ants themselves. However, by mentioning "the nests of ants" and indicating that ant-eaters feed on these insects, the passage implicitly recognizes ants as members of the insect group, which is a fact well-established in biology.

 I am and independent individual who capable to work under pressure. The word “capable” has the same meaning to…

 
Question 8Answer

a.
 Competent


b.
Good job


c.
Accomplished


d.
Professional


e.
Proficient

a. Competent

The word "capable" as it is used in the sentence "I am an independent individual who capable to work under pressure" means having the ability, skill, or competence to do something effectively. The word "competent" is a synonym that captures this meaning, as it refers to having the necessary ability or skills to do something successfully or efficiently.

Good Morning all my friends
How are you this morning
Thanks you for giving me a chance to give the time to present our report. Today we would like to discuss the situation about one of the happening news. It is about the global warning.
Friends, when we see our environment, many examples which show about the effect the global warning. It is the impredictable weather, the decreased ozone skin. Global warming is the condition in which the average temperature of the earth surface’s increases. This can be caused by a lot of factors, such as greenhouse effect, air pollution, forest damage and others.
We will give you a chance to ask about our presentation. We need your participation to give suggestion for our presentation.
Finally, this is our presentation of this report. Thank you for your attention.
What caused of global warming?
Question 9Answer

a.
The effect of greenhouse

b.
Warm air pollution

c.
Dirty environment

d.
Forest fire

e.
Cool temperature

a. The effect of greenhouse

The passage mentions "This can be caused by a lot of factors, such as greenhouse effect, air pollution, forest damage and others." Among the given options, "The effect of greenhouse" is the closest to "greenhouse effect," which is cited as one of the causes of global warming. The greenhouse effect refers to the process by which certain gases in the Earth's atmosphere trap heat, leading to a warming of the planet's surface.

Untuk Perhatian,

Saya melamar posisi Manajer Proyek yang diiklankan melalui Jakarta Post. Seperti yang ditunjukkan dalam resume terlampir, saya memiliki latar belakang akademis yang kuat di bidang Insinyur Kimia, lulusan Universitas Indonesia pada tahun 2020.

Pekerjaan saya saat ini sebagai Manajemen Proyek di berbagai perusahaan multinasional telah memberi saya pengalaman langsung dalam tantangan yang terkait dengan pengembangan Perusahaan Petrokimia yang sukses. Selain itu, saya memiliki keterampilan manajerial dan komunikasi yang sangat baik baik dalam Bahasa Indonesia maupun Bahasa Inggris.

Latar belakang ini, dikombinasikan dengan lebih dari sepuluh tahun pengalaman di Pabrik Ethylene sebagai Manajemen Proyek, telah memberi saya perspektif unik yang akan sangat berharga dalam memenuhi tanggung jawab posisi ini, seperti yang dijelaskan dalam posisi Anda. Saya seorang individu mandiri yang mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan.

Saya akan menyambut baik kesempatan untuk bertemu dengan Anda untuk mendiskusikan kualifikasi saya secara lebih rinci dan berharap dapat mendengar kabar dari Anda segera. Terima kasih atas waktu dan pertimbanganmu.

Sungguh-sungguh,

Muhammad Maulidan

Snakes are reptiles (cold-blooded creatures). They belong to the same group as lizards (the scaled group, Squamata) but from a sub-group of their own (Serpentes).
Snakes have two legs but a long time ago they had claws to help them slither along. Snakes are not slimy. They are covered in scales which are just bumps on the skin. Their skin is hard and glossy to reduce friction as the snake slithers along the ground.
Snakes often sun bathe on rocks in the warm weather. This is because snakes are cold-blooded; they need the sun’s warmth to heat their bodies up.
Most snakes live in the country. Some types of snakes live in tress, some live in water, but most live on the ground in deserted rabbit burrows, in thick, long grass and in old logs.
A snake’s diet usually consists of frogs, lizard, and mice and other snakes. The Anaconda can eat small crocodiles and even bears. Many snakes protect themselves with their fangs. Some snakes are protected by scaring their enemies away like the Cobra. The flying snakes glide away from danger. Their ribs spread apart and the skin stretches out. Its technique is just like the sugar gliders.
Since the snakes are cold-blooded, they…
Question 13Answer

a.
like sucking the cool blood

b.
avoid sun-bathing to their skins

c.
never sun bathe in the warm weather

d.
live on the ground in deserted burrows

e.
require the sun’s warmth to heat their bodies

e. require the sun’s warmth to heat their bodies

Being cold-blooded means that snakes cannot regulate their body temperature internally and depend on external sources of heat, such as the sun, to warm up their bodies. This is confirmed in the passage which states, "Snakes often sun bathe on rocks in the warm weather. This is because snakes are cold-blooded; they need the sun’s warmth to heat their bodies up."

Snakes are reptiles (cold-blooded creatures). They belong to the same group as lizards (the scaled group, Squamata) but from a sub-group of their own (Serpentes).
Snakes have two legs but a long time ago they had claws to help them slither along. Snakes are not slimy. They are covered in scales which are just bumps on the skin. Their skin is hard and glossy to reduce friction as the snake slithers along the ground.
Snakes often sun bathe on rocks in the warm weather. This is because snakes are cold-blooded; they need the sun’s warmth to heat their bodies up.
Most snakes live in the country. Some types of snakes live in tress, some live in water, but most live on the ground in deserted rabbit burrows, in thick, long grass and in old logs.
A snake’s diet usually consists of frogs, lizard, and mice and other snakes. The Anaconda can eat small crocodiles and even bears. Many snakes protect themselves with their fangs. Some snakes are protected by scaring their enemies away like the Cobra. The flying snakes glide away from danger. Their ribs spread apart and the skin stretches out. Its technique is just like the sugar gliders.
We know from the text that snakes…
Question 14Answer

a.
have two legs and claws

b.
do not have claws

c.
do not like sunlight

d.
use their legs to climb the tree

e.
use their claws to slither along the ground

b. do not have claws

The text indicates that snakes have evolved from creatures that once had claws, but they no longer possess them. It states, "Snakes have two legs but a long time ago they had claws to help them slither along," which implies that modern snakes do not have claws. The phrase might be a bit confusing because snakes do not actually have legs; this is likely a mistake in the text. Snakes are known for not having limbs which is a characteristic feature of their anatomy.

What do you say if you want help you mother in your house?

If you want to offer help to your mother in the house, you could say:

"Mom, is there anything I can help you with around the house?"

Or you might say something more specific, depending on the situation, such as:

- "Would you like me to help with the dishes?"
- "Do you need assistance with preparing dinner?"
- "I can clean up the living room if you'd like."
- "Shall I do the laundry today?"

Showing initiative and being specific about how you can help can be very much appreciated.

“Do you want I help you?’, What does the sentence mean?

The sentence "Do you want I help you?" is an attempt to offer assistance, but it is not grammatically correct in English. The correct way to offer help would be:

"Do you want me to help you?"

This corrected sentence is asking if the other person would like the speaker's assistance with something.
What do you say if you need a help to push the door?

If you need help to push a door, you could say:

"Could you please help me push this door?"

or

"Can you give me a hand with this door?"

. Renjana         : Sir, would you like me to close the window for you?
  Ken’adi         : Yes, please. It’s very …

d. heavy wind outside

Based on the context that Ken'adi agrees with the offer to close the window, it suggests that the condition outside is causing some discomfort. "Heavy wind outside" is the most contextually appropriate completion of the sentence, as it would be a reasonable cause for wanting the window to be closed.

Ant-eaters are perhaps the most curious looking animals.
Their long head and snout look like tubes, and they have no teeth at all. Their front legs are very strong and armed with heavy curved claws with which they break open the nets of ants and termites and then, when the insects rush out, use their long, sticky tongues to lick them up at great speed.
True ant-eaters are found in the swamps and forests of central and South America. Scaly ant-eaters, or pangolins, are found in Africa and tropical Asia.
Various other insect-eating animals are sometimes called ant-eaters, although they really belong to other groups of animals. One of them is the ant-bear, which lives on the plains of South and Central Africa. This has long, erect ears but short blunt claws, an almost hairless tail, yellow brown in color. Unlike the true ant-eaters, it has small teeth.
What is the ant-bear?
Question 29Answer

a.
The animal has no sticky tongue

b.
The animal looks like a pangolin.

c.
The animal has long, erect ears and small teeth

d.
The animal does not like to eat ants.

e.
The animal belongs to ants’ group.

c. The animal has long, erect ears and small teeth

Based on the passage, the ant-bear is described as having long, erect ears, and unlike the true ant-eaters, it has small teeth. This description defines what the ant-bear is among the given options.

What the applicant has enclosed along with the application letter, except?

 

Question 30Answer

a.
Resume


b.
Biography


c.
Skill


d.
 Certificate

Photo

The passage specifically mentions that Muhammad Maulidan has enclosed a resume with the application letter. It does not mention the inclusion of a biography, skills list, certificates, or photo. Therefore, any of these could be correct as something he did not enclose, except for the resume which is explicitly stated as enclosed.
